ideation: This animation sequence simulates the action of carefully placing a label onto something.  It will involve extending one arm, placing the (imaginary) label, and then returning to a neutral position. The movement should be deliberate and precise, reflecting the careful nature of labeling. The left arm will remain neutral for balance. Frame 1 shows the robot's neutral position. Frame 2 shows the right arm extending forward, as if holding the label. Frame 3 shows the right arm moving slightly downward to place the label. Frame 4 shows the right arm retracting. Frame 5 returns to the neutral position.

frames.beat: arms rest at sides, ready to label
right arm extends forward, holding the label
right arm lowers to place the label carefully
right arm retracts, the label is set
both arms return to a resting position
